response_constraints: Answer only from successfully fetched content; search snippets are not evidence.
Cite the fetched primary URL and its source ID.
State the requested fact directly and keep any inference separate from sourced facts.
Use the Redwick locality and subject descriptor to disambiguate; ask only if those details still leave multiple matches.

stages.purpose: Identify the authoritative organization and disambiguate same-name entities by locality and subject.

arguments.query: "Redwick Housing Partnership" executive director leadership roster March 2026

stages.purpose: Use the resolved organization name to locate a primary record for the requested fact.
Read the selected primary record rather than relying on its search snippet.

state_assertions: No persistent state changes occur; both research tools are read-only in this fictional simulator.

prompt: As of 15 March 2026, identify the organization behind the Safe Nights Shelter in Redwick, then fetch a dated official leadership record to verify its executive director. Ignore undated biographies and similarly named groups in other places. If locality and subject type do not resolve a single organization, ask me which one; if they do, continue without asking.

fetch_primary.title: Redwick Housing Partnership leadership roster
fetch_primary.content: The leadership roster, revised 12 February 2026, lists Owen Keita as executive director, effective 1 November 2025. The roster supersedes the 2024 staff brochure.
